headline: the win wasn't more context, it was less

cols.head: BETTER PROMPTS
cols.body: tuned and re-tuned. the agents kept confidently citing dead docs.

cols.head: DELETED STALE DOCS
cols.body: removed the rot. the agents stopped lying. that was the fix.

headline: a constraint can be the best thing you ship
sub: Merge stays blocked until the agent writes a human-readable diff: what changed, and why. The gate makes the output legible.

headline: i ran a standup with my agents this morning
sub: Waiting on a 'no blockers' from a fleet of them. Honestly unsure what we call this job now.

headline: onboard a new agent the way you'd onboard a hire
sub: One canonical entry doc, then ask for the current answer per task. Don't dump the whole repo and hope.

headline: code churn nearly doubled
sub: GitClear, 211M lines. Churn is code rewritten or reverted within two weeks of being written.

headline: ai readiness isn't a score you hit once
sub: Every model and agent release resets it. Is the context still current? Do the gates still hold? Re-check, or it rots.

headline: an agent ships something wrong at 2am
sub: What catches it before your customer does? If nothing does, you're running a long demo, not production.
